# Copilot Workspace Instructions

## Commit Message Policy for AI-Generated Code

When preparing or suggesting commit messages:

- If the commit includes code that was directly generated by AI, prefix the subject with `[AI Assisted] `.
- Do not use the prefix for commits that only used AI for debugging assistance, investigation, code review, or research with no direct AI-generated code merged.
- If uncertain, ask the user before finalizing the commit message.
